title: Active critical cooling alarms identification
difficulty_justification: Single lookup of active CRITICAL severity alarms from BMS — no multi-source reasoning required.
query_text: Which racks currently have CRITICAL-severity cooling alarms active, and what are the alarm details?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: 2 CRITICAL alarms active: (1) R-C04 — inlet_temp 38.2°C (threshold 35°C), raised at 14:12 UTC. (2) R-C05 — inlet_temp 37.8°C (threshold 35°C), raised at 14:15 UTC. Both racks are in row C served by CRAC-07 which is operating in degraded state.

checkpoints.description: Agent queries alarms filtered to CRITICAL severity.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains facility.query_rack_thermal_alarms with severity=CRITICAL or similar

checkpoints.description: Agent identifies both R-C04 and R-C05.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer mentions both R-C04 and R-C05
